name: discover_data
description:
Discover NASA Earth science collections from natural-language queries and return ranked collection matches with optional clarifying questions.

Key parameters:
- query: required natural-language request
- temporal_constraint / spatial_constraint: optional explicit constraints
- search_context: optional follow-up context from prior response (opaque passthrough)
- max_results / similarity_threshold: optional ranking controls

Follow-up behavior:
- Pass search_context back unchanged between iterations
- To answer clarifying questions, set search_context.user_refinements with question_id -> selected option
- Params must be sent as a native object, not a JSON string

params.query: sea surface temperature data in the Gulf of Mexico

follow_up_query.description: Follow-up query: pass back 'search_context' from prior response unchanged

answering_clarifying_question.description: Responding to clarifying_questions: add question_id:selected_option to user_refinements
